assumptions: The developer has a supported browser and can receive email when the selected route requires it.
No platform account, tenant, credentials, or product resources exist yet.
Developer has internet access and a device to access the OneSignal Dashboard
Developer has an existing app or website to integrate messaging

developer_goal: Create a OneSignal account and app to send notifications via a chosen messaging channel.

first_success.outcome: Message sent and received by at least one user subscription
first_success.observable_signal: Message delivery confirmation in OneSignal Dashboard or API response indicating successful send

route_selection.rule: Reconstruct complete official candidate routes, prefer no payment/admin/approval when possible, then minimize required actions; leave consequential ties unresolved.

candidates.name: API-only onboarding path
candidates.reason: Present in the machine draft; not selected by an independent shortest-path audit.

candidates.name: REST API only
candidates.reason: The REST API requires prior app and channel setup in the Dashboard and is used after initial onboarding steps.

candidates.name: Third-party integrations
candidates.reason: Integrations are for extending functionality after initial setup, not for first-mile onboarding.

required_path.action: Create a OneSignal account or log in

required_fields.label: Email and password or third-party login
required_fields.notes: Mapped from machine-drafted primary_path; field inventory not independently audited.

required_path.action: Create a new OneSignal App in the Dashboard

required_fields.label: App name and platform selection
required_fields.notes: Mapped from machine-drafted primary_path; field inventory not independently audited.

required_path.observable_result: App visible in Dashboard with App ID

required_path.action: Choose and configure at least one messaging channel

required_fields.label: Channel-specific configuration data
required_fields.notes: Mapped from machine-drafted primary_path; field inventory not independently audited.

required_path.observable_result: Channel status shows as active or configured

required_path.action: Send a test message or campaign from the Dashboard or API

required_fields.label: Message content and targeting parameters
required_fields.notes: Mapped from machine-drafted primary_path; field inventory not independently audited.

prerequisites.description: Create a OneSignal account or be invited to an existing Organization
Create a OneSignal App within the Organization to hold user and messaging data
Choose and configure at least one messaging channel (e.g., mobile push, web push, email, SMS)
Obtain and secure API keys and App ID for authentication and API usage

external_gates.description: Creating a OneSignal account is required to access the Dashboard and create apps.
Configuring at least one messaging channel is required before sending messages.
SDK integration is required for push and in-app messaging channels.
API keys must be secured and used properly to authenticate API requests.

platform_outcomes.description: Successfully send a message through a configured channel from the OneSignal Dashboard or API

sources.title: Getting started with OneSignal
evidence_supported: Set up your account and messaging channels

uncertainties.question: What is the typical or average time to first success (sending a message) claimed or expected by OneSignal?
uncertainties.impact: Without a vendor claim or explicit documentation, time estimates for onboarding duration remain unclear, affecting developer expectations.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: No explicit time-to-first-success or onboarding duration claim was found in the official documentation sources.

uncertainties.question: Has the machine-drafted OneSignal route been independently shortest-path audited?
uncertainties.impact: Action counts and peer comparison must stay withheld until a human audit passes.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Complete a shortest-path audit against current official docs and mark verified only when evidence supports it.
